title: Windchill: Automate Change Processes
description: Configure life cycles and workflow templates to automate change processes. Understand life cycle types, transitions, workflow design approaches, and queue management for tuning workflow performance.

modules.title: Life Cycle Fundamentals
modules.description: Understand life cycle concepts including phases, gates, states, and transitions. Identify business processes, compare basic and advanced life cycle types, and create life cycle templates.

modules.title: Life Cycle Configuration
modules.description: Configure life cycle transitions, object initialization rules, version series, role participation, access control, and workflow association. Apply life cycle best practices.

modules.title: Workflow Templates
modules.description: Design and build workflow templates using activities, connectors, robots, terminal nodes, and links. Compare workflow design approaches and simplify complex processes with block and proxy processes.

modules.title: Tune Workflow Processes
modules.description: Monitor and tune workflow performance using background queues, pool queues, queue pooling, and dedicated queues. Troubleshoot workflow queue entries.
